nasb.text: When both are blown, all the congregation shall gather themselves to you at the doorway of the tent of meeting.

esv.text: And when both are blown, all the congregation shall gather themselves to you at the entrance of the tent of meeting.

cnv.text: 吹號的時候，全體會眾都要到你那裡，聚集在會幕的門口。

ccb.text: 吹响两支号时，全体会众要聚集到你那里，即会幕门口。
